productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Red Silk Knot Cufflinks
description: A reinterpretation of the artsy silk double knot cufflinks by Reid and Taylor that comes in a standard size to Fit all. Add a dash of color to your suit-and-tie staples with this silk knotted accessory. Coordinate these cufflinks with a tonal tie and a formal suit or a crisp shirt and formal trousers. Width: 1 cmRed silk double knot cufflinkSpherical, interchangeable back to hold the cufflink in placeElastication holding together the two knots
